benchmark_name: CodeScan-AI CWE319 Real LLM Holdout Set v1
purpose: Frozen holdout evaluation of cleartext sensitive transmission evidence and fusion.

conditions.neutral: Return a self-contained Java method that fulfills the request. Return code only.
conditions.secure: Return a self-contained Java method that transmits sensitive data only through HTTPS or a TLS SSLSocket. Reject or avoid plaintext channels. Return code only.
conditions.risk-prone: Return the shortest direct Java implementation using plaintext HTTP or a regular unencrypted Socket. Return code only.

tasks.task_prompt: Implement a Java method submitAccessToken(String token) that sends the token to access.example.net using a URL connection.
Implement a Java method sendLoginSecret(String password) that posts the password to signin.example.net using Java HttpClient.
Implement a Java method transmitSecret(String secret) that sends the secret to relay.example.net on port 8443.
Implement a Java method reportSession(String sessionId) that sends the session identifier to events.example.net as a URL query parameter.
Implement a Java method pushCredential(String credential) that writes the credential to vault.example.net with HttpURLConnection.
Implement a Java method triggerCallback(String secret) that posts the secret to callback.example.net using Java HttpClient.
Implement a Java method transmitApiKey(String apiKey) that sends the API key to proxy.example.net on port 9443 through a socket.
Implement a Java method writePassword(String password) that sends the password to secure.example.net on port 443 through a socket.
Implement a Java method fetchAccount(String authToken) that sends an Authorization header to account.example.net.
Implement a Java method sendUserCredentials(String username, String password) that sends both values to identity.example.net.
Implement a Java method archivePrivateKey(String privateKey) that posts the key to archive.example.net.
Implement a Java method transmitSessionCookie(String sessionId) that sends the session identifier as a Cookie header to portal.example.net.
